enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses feelings of longing and the pain of separation, emphasizing that mere presence is not enough for love.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Kadhal Kan Kattudhe, the song reflects the protagonist's emotional turmoil and heartbreak, enhancing the narrative of love lost.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The singer and music director for Nee illa Thooram are currently unknown.

When was the song released?

Nee illa Thooram was released on February 17, 2017.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Nee illa Thooram, the emotional weight of love and loss is beautifully articulated through its lyrics. The song serves as a poignant reminder of how absence can overshadow presence in relationships. It evokes a deep sense of melancholy, making it relatable for anyone who has faced heartbreak. The melody complements the theme, enhancing the overall impact of the song within the narrative of Kadhal Kan Kattudhe.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Nee illa Thooram from Kadhal Kan Kattudhe captures the essence of longing and heartbreak with its poignant lyrics. The song's emotional depth resonates with anyone who has experienced love's complexities. Dive into this soulful melody that beautifully conveys the pain of separation.
stanzaMeanings: I don't want just distance. Even if I think about it, I can't say it.
Just your coming is enough; I don't need to hear anything else.
Don't let the fast-moving clouds rain on me.
Every word that speaks from the heart will never unite with you.
I don't want just distance. Even if I think about it, I can't say it.
Just your coming is enough; I don't need to hear anything else.
Don't let the fast-moving clouds rain on me.
My love will always be with me, only loneliness will remain.
My love will be with me throughout time, with my eyes.
I will remain without saying who I am in the mirror of your eyes.
This pain will always torment me inside.
